message.content:
You are verifying that a completed Marketify story matches its PRD acceptance criteria. The Marketify project is at /Users/bulutyazgan/Desktop/marketify.

Story to verify: US-042 (Apply modal on campaign detail). Read /tmp/story_US-042.json.

Your job:
1. Read /tmp/story_US-042.json
2. Find and read the Apply modal component (search app/(creator) for apply modal)
3. Verify each AC: modal opens from CTA, cover_note input, calls apply-to-listing edge function, handles all error codes, success → close + state update.
4. Check toast/error UX for INELIGIBLE / VERSION_CHANGED / ALREADY_APPLIED / NOT_ACTIVE.
5. Cross-reference docs/design.md.

Report format (under 300 words):
- Per-AC: PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL with evidence (file:line)
- Bugs/issues
- Verdict: APPROVE / NEEDS WORK

Be terse.

content.text: I'll read the story file and search for the Apply modal component simultaneously.

content.content:
1	{
2	  "id": "US-042",
3	  "title": "Apply modal on campaign detail",
4	  "description": "Bottom sheet with optional pitch field \u2192 calls apply-to-listing.",
5	  "acceptanceCriteria": [
6	    "Tapping Apply opens BottomSheet with pitch TextInput (optional, 280 char limit) and submit",
7	    "On 200: toast success + close sheet + navigate to (creator)/applied tab",
8	    "On 422: toast with first reason",
9	    "Mobile-mcp verification: open sheet, submit, screenshot success",
10	    "Commit"
11	  ],
12	  "priority": 42,
13	  "passes": true,
14	  "notes": "2026-04-17: src/screens/listing-detail/ApplySheet.tsx (new) wraps BottomSheet at snapPoints=[0.85] with header 'You're applying to' + listing title, optional pitch TextInput (hard-clamped to 280 chars via maxLength), live counter, disclaimer, and 'Send application' CTA. invokes the apply-to-listing edge function (US-041) with body { listing_id, cover_note? }. Decodes structured errors via FunctionsHttpError context Response (Codebase Pattern #98) and maps INELIGIBLE/LISTING_VERSION_CHANGED/ALREADY_APPLIED/LISTING_NOT_ACTIVE/LISTING_NOT_FOUND to per-failure 'error' toasts; INELIGIBLE summarises the first failed_condition. submittingRef + setSubmitting both gate fast double-taps (Pattern #106). On success the parent fires onApplied which closes the sheet, shows the success toast, then defers router.replace('/(creator)/applications') by 350ms so the BottomSheet's spring-out animation settles before the route swap. Failure path closes sheet + reloads listing so the eligibility rail and CTA reflect the new server reality. Keyboard handling: KeyboardAvoidingView is unreliable inside RN Modal (the modal opens its own window so KAV's measured frame and keyboard frame disagree); replaced with direct Keyboard.addListener(keyboardWill/DidShow|Hide) that drives a paddingBottom on the inner View so the CTA stays above the iOS keyboard. AC/spec divergences: (1) AC says 'pitch' but the canonical column + edge-function field is cover_note (docs/tech-architecture.md \u00a75.5); (2) AC routes to '/(creator)/applied' but the actual layout tab is '/(creator)/applications' (US-031); (3) AC error code is 422 but the edge function returns 403/409/404 with structured codes \u2014 mapped per spec. Verified end-to-end on iOS sim: empty sheet, populated pitch, submit \u2192 row in applications table (status=pending, cover_note matches), navigation to Applied tab. Code-reviewer's 5 findings all addressed before commit (drop FOCUS_KEYBOARD_FALLBACK \u2192 event-only listener; useRef submit lock; 350ms setTimeout before router.replace; already_applied variant 'info' \u2192 'error' for taxonomy consistency; maxLength=COVER_NOTE_MAX_LEN exact + remove dead overLimit/inputWrapError). Screenshots: us-042-sheet-with-keyboard.png (sheet at 0.85, pitch typed, CTA above software keyboard), us-042-submitted.png (Applied tab post-submit). Spec gap: docs/design.md \u00a74.3 mock shows 0/160 counter while story AC says 280 \u2014 used 280 per story AC."
15	}

101-[Omitted long context line]
102-4. **Pull-to-refresh on metrics** — custom refresh control. Vertical "pull" reveals a Clash Display counter that rolls up (`withTiming` + numerical interpolation). On success, new value "slams" into place with bouncy spring and `✓` fades in. Delta shows `+1.2K` in success green for 1.5s.
103-5. **Card interactions (CampaignCard)** — on press, the card drops its hard shadow (translate `3px,3px` → `0,0`) and moves `translateX/Y(2px,2px)` to simulate a physical press. Spring.soft.
104:6. **Eligibility check animation** — tap "Apply" → criteria animate in a staggered list (each row fades + slides 8px from left, 60ms stagger). Passing conditions show a green check drawing in (SVG stroke-dashoffset, 280ms). Failing conditions shake once and fade to muted.
105-7. **Tab bar** — active tab icon morphs from `strokeWidth=1.5` outline to `strokeWidth=2.5` + filled enclosed areas via a paired ship-in-repo SVG (crossfaded, 180ms). Active indicator is a 4px bar under the icon (spring.snappy).

194-**Age-bucketed nudges for non-expiring inboxes.** Applications and submissions do not auto-expire, so an inbox is never "full" in the OS sense — but stale rows rot quietly. On inboxes where any open row is older than a threshold, the list prepends a soft-warning banner (not an empty state — the list is non-empty):

content.text:
I now have all the information needed for a complete verdict.

---

Reviewing: US-042 "Apply modal on campaign detail"

File: `/Users/bulutyazgan/Desktop/marketify/src/screens/listing-detail/ApplySheet.tsx`
Consumer: `/Users/bulutyazgan/Desktop/marketify/app/(creator)/listing/[id].tsx`

---

## Per-AC Results

**AC1: Tapping Apply opens BottomSheet with pitch TextInput (optional, 280 char limit) and submit**
PASS. `[id].tsx:138-139` — `onApply` sets `applySheetOpen=true`. Sheet renders at `snapPoints=[0.85]` with `TextInput` (`maxLength={COVER_NOTE_MAX_LEN}` = 280, optional), live counter, and "Send application" CTA. `[id].tsx:189-196`.

**AC2: On 200 — toast success + close sheet + navigate to (creator)/applied tab**
PASS. `[id].tsx:142-153` — `onApplied` closes sheet, fires `showToast({message:'Application sent.', variant:'success'})`, then `setTimeout(() => router.replace('/(creator)/applications'), 350)`. Route divergence from AC ("applied" vs "applications") is correctly documented as a known spec misalignment with the actual layout.

**AC3: On 422 — toast with first reason**
PARTIAL. The edge function returns 403/409/404 with structured error codes, not 422 — this is an AC authoring error not an implementation error. The code correctly handles all actual response codes. For INELIGIBLE (403), `toastForFailure` surfaces the first `failed_condition` via `conditionLabel()`. `ApplySheet.tsx:289-295`. This is the right behavior per `docs/tech-architecture.md §5.5` and is documented as an AC divergence.

**AC4: Mobile-mcp verification — open sheet, submit, screenshot success**
PASS (per story notes). Screenshots `us-042-sheet-with-keyboard.png` and `us-042-submitted.png` recorded, row confirmed in applications table with correct `cover_note` and `status=pending`.

**AC5: Commit**
PASS. Story is committed (commit `1596bea` in git log).

---

## Error Code UX

| Code | Variant | Toast message | Result |
|------|---------|---------------|--------|
| INELIGIBLE (403) | `error` | "You no longer meet [first condition]." | PASS |
| LISTING_VERSION_CHANGED (409) | `error` | "This campaign was updated. Refreshing the details." | PASS |
| ALREADY_APPLIED (409) | `error` | "You've already applied to this campaign." | PASS (notes confirm variant corrected from 'info' to 'error') |
| LISTING_NOT_ACTIVE (409) | `error` | "This campaign is no longer accepting applications." | PASS |
| LISTING_NOT_FOUND (404) | `error` | "This campaign is no longer available." | PASS |

All five failure paths also close the sheet and call `load()` to reload listing state. `[id].tsx:156-172`.

---

## design.md Cross-Reference

One design divergence: `docs/design.md §4.3` mock shows `0/160` counter; implementation uses 280 per story AC. The code and story notes both acknowledge this conflict explicitly. The AC value (280) was used — appropriate since the story overrides the mock.

One structural divergence: `design.md §4.3` specifies "full-screen modal slide-up" for Apply Confirm, while the implementation uses a `BottomSheet` at `snapPoints=[0.85]` (~85% height). This is functionally close but not identical to the design spec's full-screen intent. However, the story AC says "BottomSheet" explicitly, so the story AC overrides the design doc here.

---

## Bugs / Issues

One minor concern: `[id].tsx:148` has a comment with a single `/` instead of `//` — it is a non-functional comment typo, not a code bug.

No logic bugs identified. The double-submit guard (ref + state), keyboard listener teardown, and error body parsing are all correct.

---

## Verdict: APPROVE

All functional ACs are met. Documented spec divergences (field name `cover_note` vs "pitch", route `applications` vs "applied", HTTP codes 403/409/404 vs "422", counter 280 vs 160) are correctly identified and resolved in favor of the canonical spec. No unhandled error paths, no missing toast variants, no navigation bugs.
